---
title: "rigid_register_implicit"
generated: true
description: "Coarse-to-fine rigid registration, each level solved implicitly."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._implicit`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:rigid_register_implicit -->
```python
rigid_register_implicit(moving: Float[Array, '*mspatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*fspatial'], *, spec: RegistrationSpec = RegistrationSpec(), space: CoordinateSpace = IndexSpace(), init_params: Optional[Float[Array, ' p']] = None) -> RegistrationResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:rigid_register_implicit -->
Coarse-to-fine rigid registration, each level solved implicitly.

The multi-resolution sibling of [`register_implicit`](../nitrix-register/register_implicit.qmd) for the 6-DOF
(3-D) / 3-DOF (2-D) rigid chart: the shared coarse-to-fine driver runs the
implicit per-level solve at every pyramid level (`spec.levels` /
`spec.iterations` / `spec.metric` as in
[`rigid_register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)). The coarse levels supply the
basin (gradient-stopped, since
$\mathrm{d}\theta^{*}/\mathrm{d}\theta_{\mathrm{init}} = 0$);
the finest level carries the gradient with respect to the images that is
exact under the implicit-function theorem. `spec.mode` is forced to
`'fixed'` (the implicit solve is its own fixed-iteration forward, so
early-exit is inapplicable).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:rigid_register_implicit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `moving` | `Float` | `*mspatial` | — | Single-channel images (2-D or 3-D), as in [`register_implicit`](../nitrix-register/register_implicit.qmd). |
| `fixed` | `Float` | `*fspatial` | — | Single-channel images (2-D or 3-D), as in [`register_implicit`](../nitrix-register/register_implicit.qmd). |
| `spec` | `RegistrationSpec` | — | `RegistrationSpec()` | Multi-resolution schedule ([`RegistrationSpec`](../nitrix-register/RegistrationSpec.qmd)): pyramid levels, per-level iterations, and the similarity metric. `spec.mode` is overridden to `'fixed'`. |
| `space` | `CoordinateSpace` | — | `IndexSpace()` | Coordinate space ([`IndexSpace`](../nitrix-register/IndexSpace.qmd) by default, or [`WorldSpace`](../nitrix-register/WorldSpace.qmd)). |
| `init_params` | `Optional[Float[Array, ' p']]` | — | `None` | Starting about-origin Lie parameters in the [`Rigid`](../nitrix-register/Rigid.qmd) layout, of shape `(p,)`; `None` uses zeros. |

**Returns** `RegistrationResult`. The registration record, with the model fixed to [`Rigid`](../nitrix-register/Rigid.qmd). Here `cost_history` is the per-level `[initial, final]` implicit-solve costs, concatenated.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:rigid_register_implicit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*mspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`mspatial`) |
| `*fspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`fspatial`) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
